title: echinochloa colonum var. repens
intro: Echinochloa colonum var. repens, also known as barnyard grass, is a type of invasive grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in various herbal preparations for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Echinochloa colonum var. repens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used topically in the form of poultices and salves.
